name: vorchestra
description: A visual operating system for local automation.

scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run build && npm run package:mac:dir --workspace @vorchestra/desktop
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run build && npm run package:mac:unsigned --workspace @vorchestra/desktop
scripts.release:mac: npm run build && npm run release:mac --workspace @vorchestra/desktop
scripts.workflow:run: npm run build --workspace @vorchestra/engine && npm run build --workspace @vorchestra/node-runner && node scripts/run-workflow.mjs
